lobby.title: Offline Cards
lobby.subtitle: Powered by boardgame.io P2P
lobby.showQRToOther: Show this QR Code to the other device:
lobby.scanOtherDeviceQR: Scan the other device's QR Code:
lobby.guestConnected: Guest Connected! You can add another or click Start Game.
lobby.copyPasteInstructions: Paste signaling text from the other device, then import. You can also copy your own signal text below.
lobby.pastePlaceholder: Paste offer/answer text or share link here
lobby.shareInstructions: Share this signaling link with the other device.
lobby.cameraIdle: Tap Start Camera to request camera access.
lobby.cameraActive: Camera is active. Keep the QR code centered.
lobby.cameraDenied: Camera permission denied. Re-enable it in browser/site settings, then try again.
lobby.cameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera scanning APIs.
lobby.cameraFallback: Live scanner unavailable. Use Copy/Paste or Share Link instead.
lobby.signalConnectedAlready: Connection is already established. No more signaling import is needed.
lobby.signalDuplicate: This signaling payload was already imported.
lobby.signalHostNotReady: Host signaling is not ready. Generate an offer first.
lobby.signalNeedAnswer: Host must import an answer payload at this step.
lobby.signalNeedOffer: Guest must import an offer payload first.
lobby.signalPickModeFirst: Pick host or guest mode before importing signaling data.
lobby.signalNothingToCopy: No signal text available to copy.
lobby.signalClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this browser.
lobby.signalNoShareData: No signal payload is available to share.
lobby.linkImportedReady: A signal was found in the URL and is ready to import.
